description: Configure the 'VIP_DIAL' campaign with Dial Method: MANUAL, Manual Dial Preview: YES, List Order: DOWN COUNT, Auto Alt Dial: NONE, and Active: Y. Import the vendor file from '~/Documents/VicidialData/vendor_senators_vip.csv' into a new active list with List ID 9500. Map the file headers as follows: 'Gov_ID' to 'Vendor Lead Code', 'Official_Name' to 'First Name', 'Contact_Number' to 'Phone', and 'Home_State' to 'State'.
